description_long: This is a medium-sized woven handbag with a rectangular base and gently flared sides, crafted from a natural, straw-like material. The body of the bag features a subtle, repeating chevron weave pattern, giving it a textured and organic appearance. Dark brown, leather-like straps are attached vertically on both the front and back, extending above the rim to form two sturdy handles for carrying by hand or over the forearm. The top edge and bottom corners are reinforced with matching dark brown material, providing both structural support and visual contrast. The interior appears spacious and unlined, suitable for carrying personal items or small groceries. There are no visible logos, decorative elements, or closure mechanisms on the exterior, emphasizing a minimalist and utilitarian design.
description: A medium-sized, woven straw handbag with dark brown leather-like handles and trim, featuring a chevron weave pattern and a minimalist, unadorned design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the woven body, two dark brown vertical straps, and both handles arching above the rim.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the narrow profile, rectangular base, and the depth of the bag, with handles visible from the side.
description_view_2: Back view nearly identical to the front, displaying the woven pattern and two vertical straps, with both handles visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, showing the narrow side and the depth of the bag.
attribute_strap_type: Two short, fixed handles made of dark brown material, attached vertically to the front and back panels, suitable for hand or forearm carrying.
